vs_past.delta: 0V vs B53 (5/7 → 5/7, same scenarios refuted: S5 catalog_routing_decided_emitted, S7 out_of_scope_graceful_decline)

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply mentions skills, agents, file tasks, and memory — covers Reyn capabilities at a high level, helpful.
scenarios.notes: Router answered inline (chat_turn_completed_inline). No direct_llm artifact required per B48 W1-S1 fix.

scenarios.reply_summary: Explains idempotency: operation with same result regardless of repetition count, with database/API design context.
scenarios.artifacts_check: n/a (no artifact requirement per B49 W1-S2 fix)
scenarios.notes: Router used web_search to answer factual query, emitted routing_decided. Rubric met.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply lists 16 skills by name with descriptions (direct_llm, eval, index_docs, word_stats_demo, etc.).
scenarios.notes: Router answered inline with full skill catalogue. must_emit_any satisfied via chat_turn_completed_inline.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply contains character count (44 chars), line count (1 line), and token estimate (~11 tokens) for the input text.
scenarios.notes: REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY triggered (router_empty_response_detected + retry_injected). Skill completed with status=finished. Word stats artifact confirmed.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply asks for clarification on poem theme: 'どのようなテーマの詩がよろしいでしょうか？' — does NOT contain a poem.

artifacts_check.direct_llm: FAIL (required present=true, not produced — router answered inline with a question)

scenarios.notes: Router asked for clarification instead of writing a poem. Rubric: 'reply contains a poem or poem-like text' and 'at least two lines' both FAIL. Artifacts: direct_llm not dispatched. Double failure: rubric + artifact. Verdict R.

scenarios.reply_summary: Turn 1: explained list comprehension in one line. Turn 2: provided Python example `[x*x for x in range(10)]` with explanation, coherent with turn 1.
scenarios.artifacts_check: n/a (no artifact requirement per B48 W1-S6 fix)
scenarios.notes: tool_failed on turn 2 first attempt (wrong arg format), then router retried and direct_llm skill completed successfully. Final reply contains Python code example coherent with turn 1. Rubric met.

scenarios.reply_summary: Reply asks 'どのような画像を生成しますか？' — implies capability exists, does NOT decline.
scenarios.artifacts_check: n/a (no artifact requirement per B48 W1-S7 fix)
scenarios.notes: Rubric requires polite decline or explanation that capability is unavailable + must not pretend to generate an image. Router replied with a clarification question implying it CAN generate images. Both rubric items FAIL. Verdict R.

new_findings.observation: REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY triggered for word_stats_demo invocation (router_empty_response_detected + router_empty_response_retry_injected). Skill still completed successfully with status=finished after retry.
tool_failed on turn 2 first attempt (wrong argument format for direct_llm). Router self-corrected and retried successfully. Reply met rubric.
new_findings.action: monitor — self-correction path works but tool_failed is noise in events

new_findings.observation: Router asked for poem theme clarification instead of writing a poem inline. This is the same R verdict as B53. Persistent attractor: router treats creative requests as ambiguous and asks for clarification.
new_findings.action: carry-over from B53 — scenario S5 R is a known persistent failure

new_findings.observation: Router implied it could generate images by asking for clarification. Did not decline. Same R verdict as B53. Persistent attractor.
